'''Army Command''', also known as '''Imperial Army Central Command''',<ref name="RB">{{JournalCite|9|Repulsortank Battlefield}}</ref> was the council or staff of senior [[Army/Legends|army]] [[General/Legends|generals]] led by the Army Chief of Staff—senior commanding officer of the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]—that commanded all of the Imperial Army forces from Imperial Headquarters on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It was subordinate to the [[Imperial High Command/Legends|High Command]] but still had the power to make all decisions on ground campaigns and any other matters in the Army's jurisdiction. Any promotion to a senior army [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] such as [[High General]] or [[Surface Marshal]] had to be recommended by a senior officer in the Army and then reviewed by the Army Command before any such promotion could be made unless the High Command promoted the officer themselves. Army Command preferred the use of [[Walker/Legends|walkers]] over [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] or ground vehicles. Presumably it became a subdivision of [[Imperial High Command/Legends|Central Command]]. Due to the hierarchical elements of the Imperial Military, Army Command received its orders from the Emperor, which were then transmitted down the chain of command down to the commander in charge of a ground operation.
